caption: A man wearing a dark shirt and a patterned beige and brown shawl speaks into a microphone labeled "ANI" while standing outdoors at night. He is surrounded by several other men, some in formal attire and others in casual clothing, under bright artificial lighting. The scene remains consistent across the frames, though the on-screen graphics change. Red and yellow banners contain Hindi text. The top frames feature the headline "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा" and "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?", along with the news logo "NEWS 18 इंडिया" and small portrait photos of political figures including "नीतीश कुमार". The bottom frames update the headline to "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है" and a caption stating "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश की NDA में वापसी से खुशी". A time stamp of "10:06 PM" is visible in the bottom right corner of all frames.
